title: Elsevier ClinicalKey Online Training
content:
Elsevier ClinicalKey Online Training

Dear Students,

Elsevier ClinicalKey is a dynamic solution that enables you to access the clinical information you need in a short amount of time. Optimised for use in clinical workflows, the content combines comprehensive information with the essential knowledge required at the patient's bedside, supporting lifelong learning. The registration link to participate in Elsevier ClinicalKey training is provided below.

Sincerely.
